violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Napkin dispenser was in hand sink basin upon arrival. *COS-napkins removed from basin.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet wiping cloth left at espresso station out of sani bucket. -Sani Bucket found at 500ppm Quat. *Maintain sanitizer at 200-400ppm Quat solution, per label instructions.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops stored in multiple dry coffee powders with handles in product.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -3 cream cheese spreads were not dated with thaw date. *Ensure refrigerated items are dated for thaw/open/make dates.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Dishes are being washed, rinsed and air dried with out sanitize step.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Laundered, proper handling, and storage (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
